hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read f; if [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ]; then npx --no-install prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; npx --no-install eslint --fix --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; exit 0; }
if [ -f tsconfig.json ]; then npx --no-install tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20 || true; fi; exit 0
